note: Added transform_callback keyword-only param to exif_transpose (and both @overload signatures). It receives the orientation int and returns a Transpose method, a sequence of methods, or None; overrides the default mapping while leaving default behavior untouched when omitted. Added test_exif_transpose_transform_callback covering: single method override, None (no transposition), sequence of methods, and in_place=True. All 35 tests in Tests/test_imageops.py pass. Note: I did not see your strip_metadata changes in my working copy of the repo (git status was clean / no diff), so my edit is purely additive on top of the original file — should merge cleanly since it doesn't touch your logic.
